SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class PsvValveModel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.PsvValveModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PsvValveModel extends Object implements Serializable
Pressure-safety-valve (PSV) model with API 520 open/close hysteresis.

The valve is a latched discharge device: it pops open when the upstream pressure reaches the set pressure and reseats only after the pressure has fallen to the blowdown (reseat) pressure Pset * (1 - blowdown). This hysteresis is what produces the characteristic PSV cycling (chattering) seen when the relief capacity exceeds the load, and the model exposes a cycle counter so that behaviour can be detected. While open, the relieving mass flow is computed from the API 520 compressible-flow orifice relation with automatic switching between critical (choked) and subcritical flow against the back pressure.

The model is intended to be used as the discharge device in both blowdown and fire-pressurisation transient runs, so that the relieving device dynamics (rather than a fixed orifice) govern the vessel pressure history.

References: API 520 Part I (sizing); API 521 (pressure-relieving and depressuring systems).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    Gets the number of open transitions (pop events) since construction or the last reset().

  • Constructor Details

    • PsvValveModel

      public PsvValveModel(double setPressurePa, double blowdownFraction, double dischargeCoefficient, double orificeAreaM2, double backPressurePa)
      Creates a PSV model.
      Parameters:
      setPressurePa - set (pop) pressure in Pa absolute; must be greater than the back pressure
      blowdownFraction - blowdown fraction from 0 (exclusive) to below 1; the reseat pressure is setPressurePa * (1 - blowdownFraction)
      dischargeCoefficient - orifice discharge coefficient (typically 0.85 to 0.975); must be positive
      orificeAreaM2 - effective orifice flow area in m²; must be positive
      backPressurePa - downstream back pressure in Pa absolute; must be non-negative
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is invalid

  • Method Details

    • update

      public boolean update(double upstreamPressurePa)
      Updates the latched open/closed state from the current upstream pressure.

      The valve opens when the pressure reaches the set pressure and closes only when it falls to the reseat pressure. Each open transition increments the cycle counter.

      Parameters:
      upstreamPressurePa - upstream pressure in Pa absolute
      Returns:
      true if the valve is open after the update

    • massFlowKgPerS

      public double massFlowKgPerS(double upstreamPressurePa, double upstreamTempK, double molarMassKgPerMol, double heatCapacityRatio, double compressibility)
      Calculates the relieving mass flow for the current open/closed state.

      Returns zero when the valve is closed. When open, the API 520 compressible orifice relation is used with automatic critical/subcritical switching against the back pressure.

      Parameters:
      upstreamPressurePa - upstream pressure in Pa absolute; must be positive
      upstreamTempK - upstream temperature in K; must be positive
      molarMassKgPerMol - fluid molar mass in kg/mol; must be positive
      heatCapacityRatio - isentropic exponent (gamma = Cp/Cv); must be greater than one
      compressibility - compressibility factor Z; must be positive
      Returns:
      relieving mass flow in kg/s (zero when closed)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is invalid

    • isOpen

      public boolean isOpen()
      Indicates whether the valve is currently open.
      Returns:
      true if open

    • getCycleCount

      public int getCycleCount()
      Gets the number of open transitions (pop events) since construction or the last reset().
      Returns:
      cumulative open-cycle count

    • getSetPressurePa

      public double getSetPressurePa()
      Gets the set (pop) pressure.
      Returns:
      set pressure in Pa absolute

    • getReseatPressurePa

      public double getReseatPressurePa()
      Gets the reseat (blowdown) pressure.
      Returns:
      reseat pressure in Pa absolute

    • getOrificeAreaM2

      public double getOrificeAreaM2()
      Gets the effective orifice flow area.
      Returns:
      orifice area in m²

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the valve to the closed state and clears the cycle counter.
